recent_60_samples.prompt: I just started working at the bookstore.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I clock in each morning?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you remember your library card today?
recent_60_samples.answer: I left it on the kitchen table.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Professor Patel mention after class?
recent_60_samples.answer: He wondered whether my topic was too narrow.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear about the chemistry lab?
recent_60_samples.answer: The equipment was upgraded over the break.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you find a quiet study area?
recent_60_samples.answer: The corner near the periodicals stays empty most evenings.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you started the term paper yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: Honestly, I have not chosen my thesis topic.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the housing office tell you?
recent_60_samples.answer: She explained how the room transfer works.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you grab your study materials?
recent_60_samples.answer: The folder that I packed is missing some notes.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you stop by the writing center?
recent_60_samples.answer: She asked when my paper would be ready.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you finalize your seminar choices?
recent_60_samples.answer: I picked the literature seminar this morning.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you finish your conclusion section?
recent_60_samples.answer: Emma helped me revise the final paragraph.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Juan tell you about the climbing trip?
recent_60_samples.answer: Harold reserved spots for the whole group.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Diane tell you about the seminar room?
recent_60_samples.answer: She asked whether we had completed the booking form.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you decided on a topic for your essay?
recent_60_samples.answer: Mariana asked whether the lab deadline could be extended.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you contacted Julian about the field trip?
recent_60_samples.answer: He has not replied to my message yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Margot say about the study room you wanted?
recent_60_samples.answer: Margot chose the room that has bigger windows.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Professor Cho say about Naomi's project?
recent_60_samples.answer: He gave her an unusually detailed reading list.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Angelina loved the writing seminar I joined.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where can I register for that workshop?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Olivia tell you what happened to the climbing helmets?
recent_60_samples.answer: They were inspected by Hector's safety team last Monday morning.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Alison say after she heard about the list?
recent_60_samples.answer: She thought Matthew had been added to the list instead.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you check the bulletin board today?
recent_60_samples.answer: I saw a flyer near the entrance.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the librarian tell you about renewals?
recent_60_samples.answer: She explained that the loan period had been shortened.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you finished your group presentation?
recent_60_samples.answer: We have not rehearsed the closing slides yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I'm thinking of joining the debate club next week.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I pick up the registration form?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you leave the lecture early today?
recent_60_samples.answer: He wanted to know whether my notes covered chapter four.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you visit the career fair this afternoon?
recent_60_samples.answer: The recruiter asked if I had submitted my resume online.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you stop by the dining hall?
recent_60_samples.answer: I grabbed a quick salad before practice.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the housing advisor mention?
recent_60_samples.answer: The lounge furniture will be delivered next Tuesday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you finish your registration this morning?
recent_60_samples.answer: I no longer need that prerequisite course.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your TA say after the lab session?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wondered when the next experiment would begin.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you talk to the international student office?
recent_60_samples.answer: Olivia asked whether the visa application was available online.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I missed the basketball game on Saturday.
recent_60_samples.answer: Did Hector start in last week's game?

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the academic advisor mention to you?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know if Emma had switched majors.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you know Matthew before this semester started?
recent_60_samples.answer: Matthew is the classmate I met at orientation.

recent_60_samples.prompt: My study group had a weird issue this week.
recent_60_samples.answer: Alison was assigned to a different study room.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear back from Juan about the project?
recent_60_samples.answer: Juan has not picked his preferred topic yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your roommate say about her classes?
recent_60_samples.answer: Naomi shares my biology lab section this semester.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you find time for coffee today?
recent_60_samples.answer: I met Diane at the campus bookstore today.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Karen told you about a fellowship for grad students.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where can I find the application form for the writing fellowship?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you discuss the scholarship with the dean?
recent_60_samples.answer: Harold wanted to know whether my financial aid had been approved.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Didn't you grab a quick break this morning?
recent_60_samples.answer: I had coffee with Margot earlier today.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did you find out about textbook pickups?
recent_60_samples.answer: The campus bookstore opens at seven tomorrow morning.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just started working at the library.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I drop off the returned books?

recent_60_samples.prompt: When did your advisor follow up with you?
recent_60_samples.answer: She asked whether my schedule worked for Thursday tutoring.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I asked the librarian about reservations earlier.
recent_60_samples.answer: She explained how the group rooms get booked.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Haven't you decided on a thesis topic yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not narrowed down my research focus.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the housing office tell you about repairs?
recent_60_samples.answer: The dorm windows were quietly replaced over the break.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did you learn during your summer break?
recent_60_samples.answer: I visited three coastal towns near the gulf this summer.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you visit the financial aid office?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know whether my deferment paperwork had reached the office.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did you discover in the archive this afternoon?
recent_60_samples.answer: The folder that I requested contained notes from the original meeting.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you mail your forms yesterday?
recent_60_samples.answer: I dropped them off after class earlier.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I've just signed up for the debate club.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where can I submit the registration paperwork today?

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Carlos ask you in the hallway?
recent_60_samples.answer: He wondered if my notes covered the quiz topics.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where did you settle on a study spot?
recent_60_samples.answer: The cubicle that I reserved has southern light.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the registrar mention about course adds?
recent_60_samples.answer: She said that the add window closes Friday morning.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you been hitting the gym lately?
recent_60_samples.answer: I no longer go to the morning sessions.

recent_60_samples.prompt: My TA just brought up the lab notebooks.
recent_60_samples.answer: Our lab notebooks were collected before the final review.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did you learn during your internship?
recent_60_samples.answer: I shadowed three senior staff during the project sprint.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you talk to the dean's office?
recent_60_samples.answer: He asked whether my transfer credits had been approved by the registrar.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Alison tell you about the housing waitlist?
recent_60_samples.answer: The dorm where she stayed has the best evening study lounges.
